Event: Spring Festival 2025
Event Date: 01/03/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: T91
Wonderful Beginning Totem

Every 4 sec, the unit reduces the physical armor of 2 nearby enemies by 40% for 4 sec and deals physical damage to them equal to 15% of their max health. The totem owner restores health equal to 80% of the damage dealt by the ability.

Requirements: 90
